Minimum Bike Requirements

    • 2 working brakes (disc brakes highly recommended)
    • Front Suspension (Dual Suspension highly recommended)
    • Tyres must be at least 1.9” wide
    • Remove mudguards longer than 25cm
    • No tandam bikes
    • No baby carriers

Please read the Mountain Bike Responsibility Code before riding.

ranging from 5km return to 35km one way","app_maintenance_message":"","app_important_callout":"","app_overview":"

This shared use trail takes riders down the picturesque Thredbo Valley along the banks of the Thredbo River. The 3 bridges (5km return) or Ranger Station (12km return) is perfect for those looking for a shorter ride with some climbing on the ride back. Riders can continue onto Thredbo Diggings (14.km one way), Lake Crackenback (20km one way), or the whole way to Gaden Trout Hatchery near Jindabyne (35k one way). The trail between Lake Crackenback and Gaden Trout Hatchery is for advanced riders only.
